name: Source Normalization to Canonical Long Skeleton
side_encoding_note: aoe2companion source uses team=1 and team=2 as the two 1v1 sides (team=0 has only 449 rows). Re-encoded 0-based: team=1 -> side=0, team=2 -> side=1. Team-game values (3+) and sentinel (255) become NULL.

symmetry_audit.side_null_note: team-game values (3+) and sentinel (255) mapped to NULL side

scoped_1v1.finding: Side=0 wins 47.18%, side=1 wins 52.81% in ranked 1v1 (leaderboard 6/18). Slot asymmetry consistent with aoestats finding (47.73%/52.27%). Source of asymmetry (server-side slot assignment mechanism) is not documented in API schema. I5 concern: documented for downstream Phase 02 symmetric treatment design.

sql_queries.create_view:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW matches_long_raw AS
SELECT
    matchId                                              AS match_id,
    started                                              AS started_timestamp,
    CASE WHEN team IN (1, 2) THEN team - 1 ELSE NULL END AS side,
    profileId                                            AS player_id,
    civ                                                  AS chosen_civ_or_race,
    CASE WHEN won = TRUE  THEN 1
         WHEN won = FALSE THEN 0
         ELSE NULL END                                   AS outcome_raw,
    rating                                               AS rating_pre_raw,
    map                                                  AS map_id_raw,
    NULL                                                 AS patch_raw,
    internalLeaderboardId                                AS leaderboard_raw
FROM matches_raw
sql_queries.symmetry_full:
SELECT side, COUNT(*) AS n_rows, SUM(outcome_raw) AS n_wins,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(outcome_raw) / COUNT(*), 4) AS win_pct,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome_raw IS NULL) AS n_null_outcome
FROM matches_long_raw WHERE side IN (0, 1) GROUP BY side ORDER BY side
sql_queries.symmetry_1v1:
SELECT side, COUNT(*) AS n_rows, SUM(outcome_raw) AS n_wins,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(outcome_raw) / COUNT(*), 4) AS win_pct,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome_raw IS NULL) AS n_null_outcome
FROM matches_long_raw WHERE side IN (0, 1) AND leaderboard_raw IN (6, 18)
GROUP BY side ORDER BY side
